summary: Tested new monitor lifecycle (Phase A live REC control + Phase E preflight modal). Backend: 9/9 pytest passing. Frontend: full E2E happy path passing — preflight opens/close/cancel, all 4 pf-check-* rows render, MonitorLiveControl appears after telemetry injection, launch button is hidden in live state, Stop toggles server-side stop_requested and telemetry.stop=true, stop-pending-hint appears.

issues: Recharts prints repeated width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on the chart container before first data point. Cosmetic only — not a functional bug, but noisy in console.

action_items: Note for main agent: the review request stated route '/app/pc/live' but the actual App.js route is '/app/live' (MyPcHub initialTab='live'). Not a bug — just correct the doc/spec if needed.
Optional: silence Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings by giving the chart wrapper an explicit initial minHeight or by rendering it only after mount.
critical_code_review_comments: Preflight `bad` check would block confirm (canProceed=false); currently only pf-check-heavy can go 'bad' when >2 heavy apps are detected. UX-wise fine, just document that scenario.

MonitorLiveControl.stopPending relies on client-side 15s timer; once user leaves and re-enters live page while stop_requested is still true on server, the hint won't show. Consider reading /api/monitor/state on mount to hydrate stopRequestedAt from requested_at.
Live.jsx polls /pc-telemetry every 1s indefinitely; no visibility-change pause. Minor perf note.
seed_data_creation: Injected 5 telemetry samples via POST /api/agent/telemetry with X-Agent-Token to simulate live state; reset stop flag at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live page route is /app/live (not /app/pc/live). To simulate live state without the .exe agent: login as admin, GET /api/agent/token, then POST /api/agent/telemetry {sample:{ts,...}} with X-Agent-Token header. Frontend flips to MonitorLiveControl within ~1s. Always POST /api/monitor/reset at the end to clear the stop flag for the admin user.
